description.value: You create a glowing crimson line around the area. Against creatures in the area, you can attempt a number of additional attacks of opportunity per round equal to your spellcasting ability score modifier ( Intelligence for magi and wizards, Charisma for bloodragers and sorcerers ), although this does not allow you to make more than one attack against a creature per action that provokes.
